// routes: Fallback to index.html for the SPA router. Static files are served first by SWA.
// mimeTypes: Force correct types for PWA files (SWA gets these wrong otherwise).
// globalHeaders: Security and privacy defaults. These apply to every response.
// auth: We rely on the bridge's bearer token for API access. SWA's built-in auth stays off by default so the public front door is browsable. Enable per-route below if you want Entra ID gating on /app.
